in my thoughts this moment. Scarey but anything we can do -

Just know you you'll be OK and somehow remember me in
the process for
anything you need in real life -not just "LAW"
as it can appear unfair and
unjust and overwhelming. . The worst fearful things are
still conquerable
and stay real at heart. You are good .
LOVE,

Marcia M.

in my thoughts this moment.  Scarey but anything we can do - - - -  - - -
Just know you you'll be OK  and somehow remember me  in the process    for anything you need in real life -not just "LAW"    as  it can appear unfair and unjust and overwhelming. .  The worst fearful things are  still conquerable and stay real at heart.   You are good .
LOVE,
 
Marcia M.

subject: Re: MARCIA   and JEE
body:
J-  I am inwardly upset and frustrated.  Can  only imagine  how u r.  Bruce 
tells me he doiesn't know how I can get to see you but I  can be decent company 
or researcher or helper or manage to make something happen  in the human way. 
   PLEAASE     (A  VISIT  would be nice diversion ,  take your dog for a 
walk,  how  about SARAH ??  - not for a walk - - - -- - - --      give JO-Jo   
something to do if I can travel to NY   ,    take the BENTLEY  for a spin  there 
or in  Florida  would make more sense or any comfier car than I  have - or the 
ESCALADE   so it has exercise AND i CAN BE  COMFY,     get you a book   - - - 
- - -- - --  -    whatever .)  I mean it.  What I can do to make  your time 
COMFIER  !!!!        You know I  do.  Make it happen.
You have always been my guy.  Whatever I can do .
HUGS  and a sisterly cheek kiss .
Marcia  M.



**************Gas prices getting you down? Search AOL Autos for 
fuel-efficient used cars.      (http://autos.aol.com/used?ncid=aolaut00050000000007)
body_html:
J-  I am inwardly upset and frustrated.  Can  only imagine how u r.  Bruce tells me he doiesn't know how I can get to see you but I can be decent company or researcher or helper or manage to make something happen in the human way.    PLEAASE     (A VISIT  would be nice diversion ,  take your dog for a walk,  how about SARAH ??  - not for a walk - - - -- - - --     give JO-Jo   something to do if I can travel to NY  ,    take the BENTLEY  for a spin  there or in Florida  would make more sense or any comfier car than I have - or the ESCALADE   so it has exercise AND i CAN BE COMFY,     get you a book   - - - - - -- - -- -    whatever .)  I mean it.  What I can do to make your time COMFIER  !!!!        You know I do.  Make it happen.
You have always been my guy.  Whatever I can do .
HUGS  and a sisterly cheek kiss .
Marcia M.

subject: Re: MARCIA   and JEE
body:
its bad,, but i'll get thorugh, with help from friends like you..hugs 


----- Original Message ----
From: "Maemarcia@aol.com" <Maemarcia@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com; jeeproject@yahoo.comweekend
Cc: Maemarcia@aol.com
Sent: Saturday, June 28, 2008 11:47:07 AM
Subject: MARCIA   and JEE

J   -   In no way do I make  light of your awful 
situation.  You know I have AUTHENTICALLY   always been with you 
in your  court.  Wish I could do something , now or during , as I have 
had the privilege of hearing things have changed.    No 
matter what, you have always been kind and generous and sincere with me like a 
brother and real friend.     Portugese tapes , a book . a 
visit --- I don't know know what is allowed or how to allow ME.  PRIVILEDGE 
????   Can't I be something  and not feel useless ?  I'll 
work for free $ .
Be kind and courteous and let me know you have read this and any 
response.  Miss you and care,
HUG (BIG)
Marcia   ( Mae Lyons  )   
954-████████




________________________________
